title: Creamy German Pineapple Stir-fry
description: A fermented and creamy German-inspired dish featuring pescatarian-friendly elements such as fermented black beans, perfectly balanced with a touch of sweet pineapple.

ingredients.name: Fermented Black Beans
ingredients.notes: Use in small quantities for authenticity

ingredients.name: Pineapple
ingredients.notes: Thawed if frozen, drained and sliced

ingredients.name: Almond Milk
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's unsweetened for this recipe

ingredients.name: Honey or Molasses
ingredients.notes: To sweeten the dish without using sugar

ingredients.name: Chili Flakes
ingredients.notes: Use sparingly to avoid overpowering the flavors

ingredients.name: Chinese Cooking Wine (optional)
ingredients.notes: To add a touch of umami to the dish, use only if desired

instructions: Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add pineapple and stir-fry until translucent, about 2 minutes.
Stir in fermented black beans, garlic powder, chili flakes, and optional cooking wine. Cook for another minute.
Pour in almond milk and honey/molasses while continuously stirring to prevent sticking.
Simmer gently for an additional 5 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.
